name: Marching Ants
description: Rounded corners and a dashed window border whose dashes march around the frame, the classic selection marquee. Dash count, fill, march speed and the dash and gap colours are this pack's own parameters, and the motion dims when the surface loses focus.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Roundness of the corners (px, 0 for square)

parameters.name: Dash count
parameters.description: How many dashes fit around the border

parameters.name: Dash fill
parameters.description: How much of each dash cell the dash occupies

parameters.name: March speed
parameters.description: How many times per second the dashes travel around the border

parameters.name: Gap colour
parameters.description: Colour between dashes, transparent by default
